mapper.select: SELECT f.board_id as boardId, f.member_id as memberId, f.category, f.title, f.content, f.thumbnail_url as thumbnailUrl, f.view_count as viewCount, f.like_count as likeCount, f.reply_count as replyCount, TO_CHAR(f.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as createdAt, m2.nickname, m2.profile_image as profilePhoto FROM freeboard f JOIN member1 m1 ON f.member_id = m1.member_id JOIN member2 m2 ON m1.member_id = m2.member_id ORDER BY f.board_id DESC
SELECT f.*, m2.nickname, m2.profile_image as profilePhoto FROM freeboard f JOIN member2 m2 ON f.member_id = m2.member_id WHERE f.board_id = #{boardId}
mapper.update: UPDATE freeboard SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE board_id = #{boardId}
